purpose_context: Epic #1945 (ToolSurfaceContract) was closed when PR #1948 merged, but a verification panel found four child issues whose acceptance criteria are not met by the shipped code. This mission finishes those four residuals -- missing native-profile-projection diagnostics and manifest provenance, registry-backed agent-config sets, an actually-enforced docs-contract lint CI gate, and the user-facing migration guide plus a flaky doctor-skills test fix -- so the reopened epic can close honestly.
purpose_tldr: Close the verified spec-to-code gaps PR #1948 left in epic #1945 so the ToolSurfaceContract epic can close on substance.
